opportunities.title: [OSS] JhaSourav07/commitpulse: UI: Add Framer Motion page transitions between routes
opportunities.description:
### 📝 Description
CommitPulse aims to feel like a premium, tier-one developer tool. Right now, when a user enters their username on the home page and hits Enter, the routing jumps instantly to `/[username]`. We want to smooth this out with a slick cross-fade transition.

### 🎯 What needs to be done
Since we already have `framer-motion` installed, implement an `AnimatePresence` wrapper in a template file so that navigating between the home page and the dashboard feels seamless and fluid.

### 📍 Where to look
- Create an `app/template.tsx` file (Next.js App Router specifically uses this file for

opportunities.title: [OSS] JhaSourav07/commitpulse: Feature: Allow users to download their raw dashboard data as JSON
opportunities.description:
### 📝 Description
Developers love raw data. While the 3D SVG is awesome, some users might want to take the streak calculations and language stats generated by our dashboard and use them in their own personal portfolios or scripts. 

### 🎯 What needs to be done
Add a "Download JSON" button inside the dashboard (perhaps under a "Developer Tools" section or in the ShareSheet). Clicking this should take the React state containing their parsed GitHub data and trigger a `.json` file download.

### 📍 Where to look
- `app/(root)/[username]/page.tsx` (Where the data is fetched).
- `components/dashboard

opportunities.title: [OSS] UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters: [ T3 Code ] Add system theme following and real-time theme switching
opportunities.description:
The theme system in `t3code/apps/desktop/src/electron/theme.ts` supports light and dark modes but does not follow the system theme automatically or allow scheduling theme switches.

### Fix

- Subscribe to the Electron nativeTheme.themeSource changes and update the app theme in real-time
- Add a system option alongside light and dark that follows OS preference
- Persist the theme choice in electron-store
- When system mode is active, theme switches immediately when OS preference changes without requiring restart

### Acceptance Criteria

- Three theme options available: light, dark, system
- S

opportunities.title: [OSS] UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters: [ T3 Code ] Add toast notification system with history panel
opportunities.description:
The web app has no in-app notification system. Server events like git push success, build failures, and session expiry have no visual feedback mechanism.

### Implementation

- Create a notification store using Zustand in `t3code/apps/web/src/stores/notificationStore.ts`
- Create `t3code/apps/web/src/components/NotificationToast.tsx` that renders toast notifications
- Support types: success, error, warning, info with corresponding colors and icons
- Notifications auto-dismiss after 5 seconds by default with configurable duration
- Stack multiple notifications vertically with smooth enter/exit

opportunities.title: [OSS] UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters: [ T3 Code ] Implement global search across chat, files, and git history
opportunities.description:
The web application lacks a global search feature for finding content across chat messages, files, and git history.

### Implementation

- Create `t3code/apps/web/src/components/GlobalSearch.tsx` accessible via Ctrl+Shift+F
- Search across three sources: chat message text, file names and contents, git commit messages
- Display results grouped by source with icons and preview snippets
- Highlight matched terms in the preview text
- Support regex search toggle and case sensitivity toggle
- Results should stream in progressively using React Query with infinite scrolling

### Acceptance Criteria

opportunities.title: [OSS] kubestellar/console: 🏗 Architect: replace ~100 registerHooks wrapper fns with 3 factory helpers
opportunities.description:
## Problem

`web/src/lib/unified/registerHooks.ts` is 1645 lines. ~100 wrapper functions follow 3 near-identical patterns — classic data-driven boilerplate.

This is the same pattern already eliminated in cached hooks via `createCardCachedHook` factory (#13752, #13765).

## Plan

### Phase 1: Demo hook table (~500 lines eliminated)
Replace 40 one-liner `function useFoo() { return useDemoDataHook(DEMO_*) }` with a config array:
```ts
const DEMO_HOOKS: Array<{ name: string; data: unknown[] }> = [
  { name: 'useCachedClusterMetrics', data: DEMO_CLUSTER_METRICS },
  // ... 39 more
]
// In register

opportunities.title: [OSS] UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters: [ T3 Code ] Add ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation to ChatView
opportunities.description:
The `ChatView.tsx` in `t3code/apps/web/src/components/` lacks proper ARIA attributes for screen reader support. The chat messages timeline is not navigable via keyboard alone.

### Fix

- Add `role="log"` and `aria-live="polite"` to the messages container in ChatView
- Add `role="listitem"` to each message in MessagesTimeline
- Add `aria-label` to all interactive buttons (send, attach, clear) in ChatComposer
- Implement keyboard navigation: Arrow Up/Down to move between messages, Enter to expand message details, Escape to return to composer
- Add skip links to jump between the sidebar, chat me

opportunities.title: [OSS] shamilahmdt/devtasks: 🟢 Good First Issue: Implement Task Search Functionality — Beginner Friendly
opportunities.description:
## 🎯 Issue: Implement Task Search Functionality

**Title:**
🟢 **Good First Issue: Implement Task Search Functionality — Beginner Friendly**

---

### 📌 Description

As the task list grows, finding specific entries becomes more difficult. This issue aims to add a minimalist search bar to the Task List page, allowing users to find specific tasks instantly by filtering keywords in real-time.

This is a great task for practicing React state management and array filtering while adhering to a strict design system.

---

## 🎯 Your Tasks

### 1️⃣ Add Search State
Implement a state variable to capture

opportunities.title: [OSS] UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters: [ T3 Code ] Add Effect.Cache-based provider API response caching with TTL
opportunities.description:
The server makes repeated calls to external provider APIs for model listing and capability queries without caching, causing unnecessary latency and API quota consumption.

### Implementation

- Create `t3code/apps/server/src/services/ProviderCache.ts` using Effect.Cache with configurable TTL
- Cache provider model lists with a 5-minute TTL
- Cache capability queries with a 15-minute TTL
- Implement cache invalidation on provider configuration changes via Effect.Hub subscription
- Add cache hit/miss metrics exposed through the observability layer
- Use Effect.Cache.make with lookup function tha
